description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for a C# server that runs on push and pull request events, excluding changes to WebAssets. Use a windows-latest job to check out the code, set up multiple .NET versions (2.1.x, 3.1.x, 6.0.x), clear NuGet locals, cache NuGet packages, build, test, and pack the project in Release configuration. For the main branch, push the package to NuGet and upload it as an artifact.
